outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated - spot at gamma flip with negative weekly/monthly GEX amplifying moves
outlook.summary: Critical inflection at 0DTE gamma flip. Extreme bearish positioning (PCR 4.09 monthly) with smirk skew indicates heavy hedging. Positive 0DTE GEX (+3.51B) provides short-term stability, but negative weekly/monthly GEX (-4.81B combined) creates volatility risk. Strong structural supports at 630-640. Break below 650 accelerates toward resonance levels.

levels.motivazione: Massive put interest across ALL expirations: 0DTE 54.7K OI, Weekly 129K OI (highest), Monthly 132K OI (highest). Ultimate structural support with multi-expiry dealer hedging concentration.
Dominant put interest in all three expirations: 0DTE 60K OI (highest), Weekly 23K OI, Monthly 100K OI. Major structural support zone with dealer gamma concentration.
0DTE gamma equilibrium point. Spot is 0.06% above - critical inflection for directional movement. Combined with Weekly Max Pain proximity creates high-probability pivot zone.
Weekly Max Pain at spot level (655.94). Strong magnetic attraction for price. MM target zone where option value is minimized. Confluence with 0DTE gamma flip intensifies attraction.
Significant call interest in 0DTE (27.5K OI, 2nd highest) and Weekly (18K OI, highest weekly call). First resistance above spot with mixed put hedging overhead.
0DTE second highest put OI (46.8K) with extreme volume activity (441K vol, 9.4x OI ratio). First major support below spot. High volume/OI indicates unusual activity.
0DTE highest call OI (46.4K) with Monthly support (20K OI, 2nd highest). Major resistance confluence. Bearish skew validates resistance strength.
Monthly highest call OI (34.2K). Extended resistance target aligned with Monthly Max Pain (665). Upper bound for bullish scenarios.

market_regime.interpretation: Put walls are temporary support (breakdown likely). Call walls are strong resistance. Gamma flip acts as dynamic resistance.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed near-term due to positive GEX; risk of volatility expansion if spot breaks below 6604. Monthly negative GEX (-11.87B) introduces tail risk.
outlook.summary: Market is positioned at a critical inflection point just above the 0DTE gamma flip. Dealers are long gamma (+22.99B total GEX), which should suppress volatility and stabilize prices. However, the persistent smirk skew (1.39 ratio) and extremely high PCR (1.54-3.29 across expiries) reveal strong bearish undercurrents. The 6604 level is the key pivot - above it, dealer hedging provides support; below it, negative gamma dynamics could accelerate downside. Max Pain at 6550 creates magnetic pull below spot. Watch for potential mean reversion between 6604 pivot and 6750 Call Wall.

levels.motivazione: Critical 0DTE gamma flip 17 points below spot. Dealer hedging pivot point - long gamma above provides stability, selling pressure accelerates below.
Major confluence: Put Wall in both WEEKLY (OI 7752) and MONTHLY (OI 23612). Strong structural support validated by bearish skew sentiment.
Dominant 0DTE Call Wall with OI 18400. Primary resistance ceiling above spot. Dealer hedging creates selling pressure at this level.
Key 0DTE Put Wall with OI 8809 and exceptional volume (89334). Volume/OI ratio 10.1x indicates heavy institutional defense.
0DTE Max Pain level 1.1% below spot. Market maker target zone - magnetic attraction for price resolution.
Exceptional volume zone: Calls 109577 VOL, Puts 9412 VOL. Call volume/OI ratio 16.9x indicates aggressive positioning at spot.

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate volatility expected. Positive total GEX (~2.2B) indicates dealer hedging will suppress movement. Spot pinned near 0DTE gamma flip creates equilibrium conditions.
outlook.summary: Market at critical equilibrium with spot (24212.75) hovering just above 0DTE gamma flip (24187). Positive GEX across near-term expiries suggests stability and pinning behavior. Max Pain at 24100 acts as magnetic attractor. Key resistance at 24300 resonance level across all expiries; structural support at 24000 confluence. Bearish skew in weekly/monthly indicates hedging demand but positive GEX offsets volatility expansion.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE gamma flip within 0.1% of spot. Critical inflection where cumulative GEX transitions. Positive dealer gamma above this level suppresses volatility and stabilizes prices.
Monthly Max Pain within 0.47% of spot. Strong magnetic attraction as dealers target minimal payout. Unusual call volume (3049 VOL) confirms institutional interest at this strike.
Significant call OI across ALL three expiries: 0DTE (142), WEEKLY (202), MONTHLY (411). Exact strike resonance creates structural ceiling. Break above targets 24500+.
Major put OI confluence: 0DTE (479) + MONTHLY (535). Psychological level with dealer delta hedging support. Bearish smirk in monthly validates put demand.
High 0DTE put OI (486) + dominant WEEKLY call OI (543). Cross-expiry friction creates choppy price action. Bearish weekly skew (1.42) supports downside hedge interest.
Dominant 0DTE call OI (729) defines upside ceiling. Psychological resistance with presence across all expiries. Break unlikely without catalyst.
Largest 0DTE put OI (680) provides structural floor. Deep support with high volume activity (874 VOL). Break would trigger gamma selling cascade.
